title: Normalize units format (space before unit)
description:
Ensure consistent unit formatting with space before unit.

Current:
  LOG_INF("started: SF10, BW125, %uMHz");  // no space
  LOG_DBG("RX %d bytes, RSSI=%d dBm");     // inconsistent

Target:
  LOG_INF("lora_l2: started (915 MHz, 14 dBm, SF10)");
  LOG_DBG("lora_l2: RX %d bytes (RSSI %d dBm, SNR %d dB)");

Units: MHz, kHz, dBm, dB, bytes, ms, us
close_reason: Fixed: Normalized units - space before MHz and dBm in log messages
